name: Inspiration
overview: On Women’s Day, they come up with a short film documentary that includes interviews and talk sessions with Bollywood actresses who have been part of the MeToo movement. Actresses like Tanushree Dutta, Taranjit Kaur, and Ishani Sharma came on board to be part of it.

trailers.title: Inspiration | Official Teaser | Reaction | ULLU Originals | Tanushree Dutta, Ishani Sharma
